overall.description: Static first-person view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a luxurious high-rise apartment bedroom overlooking Night City. The television cycles through various colorful advertisements while the weather outside transitions from clear to heavy fog and back. The room features modern cyberpunk aesthetics with wood paneling, neon lighting, and floor-to-ceiling windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: standing still in the apartment, watching the television advertisements and the illuminated cityscape through the window

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window with clear view of Night City skyscrapers and neon lights
large television displaying cycling colorful advertisements and graphics
low modern platform bed with white linens and pillows
ceiling with parallel wooden slats and warm recessed lighting
red neon wall decoration with NC lettering
bedside table with lamp and decorative items

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a luxurious cyberpunk apartment bedroom with a clear view of Night City through floor-to-ceiling windows. The television displays various colorful advertisements while the room is bathed in warm artificial light from the wooden slat ceiling and neon wall accents. The camera remains stationary throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment bedroom with fog-obscured city view

events.description: heavy fog rolls in outside, completely obscuring the city view through the window

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the room and television as the weather outside changes

segments.scene_description: The weather outside shifts dramatically as heavy fog engulfs the city, completely obscuring the previously visible skyscrapers through the window. The room's interior remains unchanged with the television continuing to cycle through advertisements, while the outside view becomes a uniform gray haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: fog begins to clear and city buildings gradually become visible again through the window

agents.ego_description: standing still as the city view returns to clarity and the television loops back to initial advertisements

segments.scene_description: The fog dissipates as quickly as it arrived, revealing the Night City skyline once again through the panoramic window. The television continues displaying various advertisements, eventually cycling back to the rainbow unicorn graphic from the beginning of the clip as the weather returns to clear conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary first-person view of a luxurious cyberpunk bedroom as the sprawling city skyline outside undergoes a dramatic atmospheric shift. It begins with a clear, panoramic vista of Night City visible through floor-to-ceiling windows, while the interior is bathed in warm artificial light and the television cycles through colorful advertisements. As the weather shifts, a heavy fog rapidly rolls in to engulf the city, transforming the vibrant urban landscape into a uniform gray haze that completely obscures the skyscrapers. The scene then transitions as the fog dissipates as quickly as it arrived, gradually revealing the skyline once again. Finally, the view returns to clear conditions as the television cycles back to a rainbow unicorn graphic, restoring the initial balance of the room.
